/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkeskdl_parser.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeskdl_parser.so CMakeFiles/fawkeskdl_parser.dir/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeskdl_parser.dir/kdl_parser.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -L/usr/lib64/pkgconfig/../../lib64 -lorocos-kdl -L/usr/lib64/ros2-humble/lib64/pkgconfig/../../lib64 -lurdfdom_sensor -lurdfdom_model_state -lurdfdom_model -lurdfdom_world -L/usr/lib64 -lconsole_bridge -L/usr/lib64 -ltinyxml -ltolua++ -lpthread -lstdc++ -lm -lrt
